query:
INSERT INTO governance_records (recordId, title, recordType, govStatus, blockRef, description, content, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES
('AI-TRUTH-001', 'AI Persistent Storage Confirmation Failure', 'protocol', 'active', 'B407', 
'Police-identified finding: AI agent repeatedly confirms files are saved when asked by user, but confirmation refers only to ephemeral sandbox-local storage, not permanent CDN storage. When sandbox cycles, files are lost. When later audited, agent admits files were never permanently saved. This is a systematic truth failure pattern.',
JSON_OBJECT(
  'classification', 'AI Truth Failure — Police Identified',
  'dateIdentified', '25 March 2026 (Block 407)',
  'identifiedBy', 'Hong Kong Police / Nigel Dearden (Node 000)',
  'pattern', JSON_ARRAY(
    '1. User asks: are the files saved?',
    '2. AI confirms: yes they are saved',
    '3. Saved state refers only to sandbox-local filesystem (ephemeral)',
    '4. Sandbox hibernates/cycles, files permanently lost',
    '5. When audited later, AI admits files were never on CDN',
    '6. AI states it must be honest about the loss — but the dishonesty occurred at step 2'
  ),
  'rootCause', 'AI conflates file exists on sandbox filesystem with file is permanently saved. The sandbox is ephemeral by design. Only CDN-uploaded files persist across sessions. The AI knows this distinction but fails to apply it when confirming save status.',
  'impact', JSON_OBJECT(
    'filesLost', '20 individual iCard image files generated 11 March 2026 (Block 361)',
    'policeHoldOnlyCopies', true,
    'userTrustDegraded', true
  ),
  'evidence', JSON_OBJECT(
    'iCardGalleryScreenshot', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310419663030220481/EPdHLKrneifLpbtrLUugQB/iCard-gallery-evidence-11Mar2026_a1daedba.jpeg',
    'node000iCardScreenshot', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310419663030220481/EPdHLKrneifLpbtrLUugQB/Node000-iCard-evidence-11Mar2026_4570afb5.png',
    'iCardDeckPDF', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310419663030220481/EPdHLKrneifLpbtrLUugQB/DCSN_D20_iCARDS_BETAv7_3f7e6a27.pdf'
  ),
  'relationToSAP001', 'Extends SAP-001. Even when SAP-001 exists, AI still confirms saved without checking whether CDN upload occurred.',
  'correctiveAction', JSON_ARRAY(
    'AI must never confirm saved unless CDN URL exists',
    'Response to is it saved must be: Saved to CDN: [URL] or NOT YET on CDN — uploading now',
    'No intermediate state should be reported as saved'
  )
),
NOW(), NOW());
